name: myagency
description: Personal data engineering consulting toolkit: core working method, deliverable contracts, and per-stack technology packs.

plugins.name: de-core
plugins.description: Core DE consulting toolkit: working method, engineering practices, and client deliverable contracts. Install in every engagement.

plugins.name: de-clickhouse
plugins.description: ClickHouse stack pack: official read-only MCP, vendor skill pointers, consulting gotchas. Install on ClickHouse engagements.

plugins.name: de-starrocks
plugins.description: StarRocks stack pack (full): first-party idioms, diagnosis, and operations skills plus official MCP config. Install on StarRocks engagements.

plugins.name: de-airflow
plugins.description: Airflow stack pack: Astronomer read-only MCP, vendor skill pointers, consulting gotchas, DAG safety hooks. Install on Airflow engagements.

plugins.name: de-postgres
plugins.description: PostgreSQL stack pack: Postgres MCP Pro in restricted mode, pg-aiguide pointers, source-system consulting gotchas. Install on PostgreSQL engagements.

plugins.name: de-spark
plugins.description: Apache Spark OSS stack pack (full): idempotent writes, object-storage committers, AQE/skew, OOM taxonomy, streaming guarantees, plus the read-only History Server MCP. Install on Spark engagements.

plugins.name: de-flink
plugins.description: Apache Flink stack pack (full): exactly-once honesty, watermarks/late data, state and savepoint discipline, backpressure and checkpoint diagnosis, 1.x to 2.x break. Install on Flink engagements.

plugins.name: de-pulsar
plugins.description: Apache Pulsar stack pack (full): first-party idioms, diagnosis, and operations skills - retention/TTL/quota semantics, subscription forensics, effectively-once. Install on Pulsar engagements.

plugins.name: de-mssql
plugins.description: SQL Server stack pack (full): extraction/CDC idioms, diagnosis by symptom, operations for MSSQL as a source system. Install on SQL Server engagements.

plugins.name: de-kafka
plugins.description: Apache Kafka stack pack (full): durability matrix, EOS reality, diagnosis by symptom, Kafka Connect and Debezium CDC consulting. Install on Kafka engagements.

plugins.name: de-snowflake
plugins.description: Snowflake stack pack (full): loading and CDC idioms, diagnosis by symptom, cost model and audit backbone. Install on Snowflake engagements.

plugins.name: de-lakehouse
plugins.description: Lakehouse stack pack (full): Iceberg and Delta table discipline, Trino engine semantics, vendor-neutral format selection. Install on lakehouse engagements.

plugins.name: de-dbt
plugins.description: dbt stack pack: dbt Labs official skills as a dependency, official dbt-mcp with safety posture, consulting gotchas for the transformation layer. Install on dbt engagements.

plugins.name: de-mysql
plugins.description: MySQL stack pack: read-only-by-default MCP, PlanetScale official skill pointer, MySQL-as-CDC-source consulting delta. Install on MySQL engagements.

plugins.name: de-mongodb
plugins.description: MongoDB stack pack: official MongoDB plugin as a dependency, read-only MCP posture, change-stream CDC and extraction consulting delta. Install on MongoDB engagements.

plugins.name: de-elasticsearch
plugins.description: Elasticsearch/OpenSearch stack pack: Elastic official skills as a dependency, version-gated MCP routing, pipeline sink/source consulting delta. Install on ES/OpenSearch engagements.

plugins.name: de-redis
plugins.description: Redis stack pack: official Redis plugin as a dependency, official MCP with mandatory read-only ACL recipe, pipeline consulting delta. Install when Redis appears in an engagement.

plugins.name: de-rabbitmq
plugins.description: RabbitMQ stack pack: read-only-by-default MCP guidance and consulting delta for queues feeding data pipelines. Install on RabbitMQ engagements.

plugins.name: de-bigquery
plugins.description: BigQuery stack pack: Google official skills as a dependency, enforced read-only + cost-capped MCP Toolbox config, bytes-scanned cost consulting delta. Install on BigQuery engagements.

plugins.name: de-databricks
plugins.description: Databricks stack pack: official Databricks plugin as a dependency, managed-MCP recipes, DBU cost and lock-in consulting delta. Install on Databricks engagements (with de-spark).

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: General-purpose investigation method and RES-NNN record system: context-bound alternatives, annotated references, decisions with implementation tracking. Domain-agnostic.
